pages.text: Pinnacle Critical Care Plan 1. Supplemental critical care plan. Designed as add-on coverage. Limited benefit not comprehensive health insurance. Does not satisfy ACA minimum essential coverage. Pairs with STM or other primary coverage. NEO Pinnacle network.
